backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining user profile management (sport, skill level, location permission) and helicopter booking via Google Calendar HTTP outcalls, with profile storage keyed by Principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (EventsPage sport filtering via SportContext) to source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes of every page and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Sport Buddies SPA, mounting the React app at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining all application routes under two layouts (full nav and header-only), wrapped in QueryClientProvider and SportProvider with a Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Map, Events, Coins, Profile) using maroon background and gold active state, with exact-match detection for the Home tab.
frontend/src/components/DebugBanner.tsx: Debug overlay banner displaying the current route, authentication status, and profile completion state as small badges.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with an error message and a 'Go Home' button.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header displaying the Sport Buddies logo/wordmark, a coin balance pill linking to /coins, a QR/UPC scanner button linking to /scan, and an emergency shield button linking to /emergency.
Full-screen centered loading spinner with a 'Loading Sport Buddies…' message, used as a Suspense or route-level fallback.
frontend/src/components/LocationPermissi: Modal dialog that prompts the user to enable location access, with Cancel and Enable Location buttons and an optional requesting state.
frontend/src/components/PresenceBanner.t: Fixed banner below the header showing a live sport presence status with an animated ping indicator that stops flashing after a configurable timestamp.
frontend/src/components/ScreenBanner.tsx: Debug/dev utility banner that displays the current screen name and route name in a yellow monospace strip.
frontend/src/context/SportContext.tsx: React context providing global sport activation state, user mode, location toggle, event list (with join/leave), and coin-balance integration, with localStorage persistence for attended event IDs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActivationStatus.t: Hook that manages a 10-second 'OUT_NOW' activation timer persisted in localStorage, exposing status, remaining seconds, and an activate callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Hook that tracks attended event IDs in localStorage, awards +5 coins on first attendance via useCoinBalance, and synchronizes state across tabs using custom and storage events.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoinBalance.ts: Hook that reads and writes a coin balance to localStorage, exposes addCoins and updateBalance helpers, and syncs balance across components via a custom 'coinBalanceUpdated' event.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoinScanner.ts: Hook that wraps useQRScanner to validate scanned codes against a hardcoded reward table, awards coins for unclaimed valid codes, and tracks claimed codes in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useEventJoinState.ts: Custom hook that manages event join state (joined IDs and participant count overrides) using localStorage with cross-tab synchronization via storage and custom events.
frontend/src/hooks/useHelicopterAvailabi: React Query hook that checks helicopter availability for a given time range by calling the backend actor's `checkHelicopterAvailability` method and parsing the JSON response.
React Query mutation hook that submits a helicopter booking to the backend actor and invalidates availability queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocationPermission: Hook that checks and requests browser geolocation permission, returning the current permission state and helper functions to query or prompt for access.
frontend/src/hooks/usePresenceState.ts: Hook that manages a user's 'OUT_NOW' presence status in localStorage, handling activation with a 10-minute expiry, a 10-second flash period, and periodic expiry checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend interactions including checking profile completion, fetching user profile, and completing a user profile via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useRedemptions.ts: Hook that manages reward redemptions stored in localStorage, supporting adding new redemptions with generated codes and cross-tab synchronization.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines the Sport Buddies brand theme using CSS custom properties with a dark maroon/gold/black color scheme, plus utility classes for buttons, inputs, and scrollbar hiding.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ActivateSportScreen.t: Screen that lets users select a sport from a list of chips to instantly activate their presence, handling location permission checks and navigating to the map on activation.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Authentication page that provides Sign In and Sign Up buttons using Internet Identity, then redirects users to either the home screen or profile setup based on profile completion status.
frontend/src/pages/CoinGrabPage.tsx: QR code scanning page that awards coins to users who scan valid, unclaimed QR codes, tracking claimed codes in localStorage to prevent duplicate redemptions.
frontend/src/pages/CoinsPage.tsx: Coins dashboard page displaying the user's coin balance and action cards for earning coins via helicopter reservations, UPC/QR scanning, and friend invitations.
frontend/src/pages/CreateEventPage.tsx: Placeholder page for event creation that displays an optional prefilled sport from URL params and a coming-soon message for the full event creation functionality.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyPage.tsx: Minimal placeholder page for an Emergency feature with no implemented functionality.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyShieldPage.t: Implements an SOS/Emergency Shield page where users hold a button to activate an emergency status, log actions (notify buddies, notify emergency contact, call 911), and end the emergency with a cooldown timer.
frontend/src/pages/EventDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed information for a single event, allowing users to join, leave, complete, cancel, or mark attendance, with coin rewards for attendance.
frontend/src/pages/EventsPage.tsx: Lists all events with sport-based filter chips, auto-syncing the filter with the active sport from context, and navigates to event detail or event creation pages.
frontend/src/pages/HelicopterPage.tsx: Provides a helicopter booking form with availability checking, passenger/weight validation, and payment via cash or coins (costing 2000 coins).
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the app home screen with primary navigation buttons for activating a sport, map, helicopter, marketplace, and emergency shield, plus a presence banner when a sport is active.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Static informational page explaining how to earn and spend Sport Buddy Coins, listing steps and coin values for various actions.
frontend/src/pages/InvitePage.tsx: Displays an invite friends page with a static referral link that users can copy to clipboard or share via the Web Share API, plus a how-it-works explanation.
frontend/src/pages/MapPage.tsx: Shows a list of nearby sport buddies with sport-based filtering and a 'Go Live' status toggle, syncing the active filter with the global SportContext.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Renders a two-tab marketplace UI listing mock peer-to-peer gear items and nearby pro shops, with toast-based interactions for viewing, contacting sellers, and posting items.
frontend/src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: Simple 404 page that displays a 'Route Not Found' message and a button to navigate back to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/PresenceDetailPage.ts: Shows a detail view for a specific nearby buddy (looked up by ID from mock data), including their sport, status, distance, and action buttons to invite to an event or scan their QR code.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page allowing status selection (Out Now, On My Way, Planned), location permission toggling, and logout, with data sourced from the Internet Identity hook and user profile query.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Onboarding form that collects a user's name, primary sport, skill level, and location permission preference, then submits via the completeProfile mutation and redirects to home.
Displays the details of a single coin redemption including item name, cost, status, redemption code (with copy button), and claim instructions. Fetches the redemption by ID from URL params and shows a not-found state if missing.
frontend/src/pages/SafetyPage.tsx: Safety hub page with two feature cards—Emergency Shield and Emergency Notifications—each offering Setup and Learn actions via navigation or toast messages.
frontend/src/pages/ScannerStubPage.tsx: Placeholder scanner page shown in preview/non-device environments, displaying a camera-unavailable message and description based on the 'type' query param (upc or qr).
frontend/src/pages/ScanPage.tsx: Scan landing page with two options (Scan UPC/CoinGrab and Scan QR Badge) that navigate to the coin-grab route if a camera is available, or show a fallback toast in preview environments.
frontend/src/pages/SessionPage.tsx: Minimal page that displays a session ID extracted from URL params.
frontend/src/pages/SOSLogPage.tsx: Shows a list of past SOS/emergency events loaded from localStorage, displaying start time, duration, and actions taken per event. Includes a clear-all confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: Coin store page listing redeemable items filterable by category, showing the user's coin balance and handling item redemption with a confirmation step before deducting coins and navigating to the redemption detail page.
frontend/src/services/calendarIntegratio: Stub service for Google Calendar integration providing mock implementations of `getCalendarFreeBusy` and `createBookingEvent` that simulate API delays and return hardcoded/generated values for MVP use.
frontend/src/utils/safeNavigate.ts: Utility that validates a target route path against a whitelist of known valid prefixes before navigating, showing a 'Coming soon' toast for unrecognized routes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based semantic colors, Sport Buddies brand colors (maroon, gold, charcoal), custom shadows, border radii, and accordion keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for Sport Buddies tracking schema version, implemented features, known issues, and pending feature requests—primarily documenting the EventsScreen auto-filtering by active sport via SportContext.
